svg.title: Omi-Gnomon Raw JABCode Chronograph
svg.desc: Raw JABCode-style high-face symbol with start/end time, Code16K timing bridge, Code128 low rail, and RGB arrows mapping R,G,B to x,y,z.
svg.metadata: { "type": "omi-gnomon-raw-jabcode", "version": "0.2", "note": "Raw JABCode-style SVG carrier, not a full BSI-compliant JAB encoder.", "startTimeUTC": "2026-06-04T04:27:45.367+00:00", "endTimeUTC": "2026-06-04T05:27:45.367+00:00", "carrier": { "jabcode": "primary high face: start/end time and optical matrix", "code16k": "bridge rail: animation frame timing / 16xy", "code128": "low rail: atomic payload / 4y2" }, "q": "Q_chrono(x,y)=60x^2+16xy+4y^2", "rgbAxes": { "R": "x", "G": "y", "B": "z" }, "divisorsOf60Minutes": [ 30, 20, 15, 12, 10, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1 ], "animationFrames": [ { "t": 0.0, "rgb": "#ff0000", "axis": "x", "label": "R\u2192x" }, { "t": 0.33, "rgb": "#00ff00", "axis": "y", "label": "G\u2192y" }, { "t": 0.66, "rgb": "#0000ff", "axis": "z", "label": "B\u2192z" }, { "t": 1.0, "rgb": "#ffffff", "axis": "origin", "label": "sync" } ] }
svg.text: start/end time lives at the JABCode high face; animation frames inject through the Code16K bridge

g.text: anchors: omi---imo | R:x G:y B:z | Q=60x²+16xy+4y²
